name: write_schematic
full_help:
write_schematic

Description: 
Export schematic 

Syntax: 
write_schematic  [-force] [-format <arg>] [-orientation <arg>] [-scope <arg>]
                 [-name <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
name of the output file

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-force]        Overwrite existing file
  [-format]       Values: native or pdf. read_schematic can be used to view 
                  native format.
                  Default: native
  [-orientation]  Values: landscape or portrait
  [-scope]        Values: current_page, visible or all
                  Default: current_page
  [-name]         Schematic window title
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>          Output file

Categories: 
FileIO
